name: linkblog-extension
description: Save links to your linkblog from any browser tab

scripts.build: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm compile && pnpm copy-assets:chrome && pnpm copy-assets:firefox
scripts.copy-assets:chrome: rm -rf dist/chrome && mkdir -p dist/chrome/popup && cp manifest.chrome.json dist/chrome/manifest.json && cp -r dist/background dist/types dist/chrome/ && cp dist/popup/popup.js dist/chrome/popup/ && cp src/popup/popup.html dist/chrome/popup/ && cp src/popup/popup.css dist/chrome/popup/ && cp -r icons dist/chrome/
scripts.copy-assets:firefox: rm -rf dist/firefox && mkdir -p dist/firefox/popup && cp manifest.firefox.json dist/firefox/manifest.json && cp -r dist/background dist/types dist/firefox/ && cp dist/popup/popup.js dist/firefox/popup/ && cp src/popup/popup.html dist/firefox/popup/ && cp src/popup/popup.css dist/firefox/popup/ && cp -r icons dist/firefox/
scripts.package:firefox: pnpm build:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --filename {name}-{version}.xpi --overwrite-dest
